examples: He practiced arduously and soon began to play in local bands.
Many people arduously held an umbrella which was always blown down by a blast of wind.
While garbage collection must be tolerated, arduously long pause times are another matter entirely.
To do so, they have spent the last several years arduously studying the world's best surfing reefs.
These are the people who know Gorbachev best, have lived under his rule and are arduously seeking something better.
